privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic Business Continuity Plan document (bcp_draft.docx) created programmatically by setup_task.sh using python-docx library. The document contains exactly four required content sections: Executive Summary and Recovery Strategies in portrait orientation, Business Impact Analysis and Emergency Contact Matrix in landscape orientation. The input file is located at /home/ga/Documents/bcp_draft.docx and the expected output should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/bcp_formatted.docx. The verifier checks that the reformatted document contains at least 4 sections with appropriate mixed orientations and preserves all key content phrases.
